title: Green Shoots in an Altered Mobility Landscape: The Way Ahead

summary.about: The uneven recovery and longer-term prospects of India’s vehicle market after lockdown.
summary.audience: Automotive manufacturers, mobility investors and industrial policymakers.
summary.method: Reviews company sales, industry forecasts, rural demand, emissions rules and electric-vehicle policy.
summary.insights: Two- and three-wheelers have stronger prospects because of affordability, rural demand, social distancing and EV incentives.
